category_sources: Official site https://datafusion.apache.org/ describes Apache DataFusion as an extensible query engine using Apache Arrow.
source_facts.description says Apache Arrow DataFusion and Ballista query engines.
display_name_sources: GitHub README heading uses Apache DataFusion at https://github.com/apache/datafusion.
Official site title and heading use Apache DataFusion at https://datafusion.apache.org/.
docs_sources: Official documentation site at https://datafusion.apache.org/ has user guide, library user guide, contributor guide, and CLI pages.
Official site links API Docs at docs.rs from https://datafusion.apache.org/.
repo_sources: GitHub repository title is apache/datafusion and README says Apache DataFusion.
Official DataFusion site links GitHub and Issue Tracker to https://github.com/apache/datafusion.
tags_sources: Official site describes an extensible query engine written in Rust using Apache Arrow with SQL and DataFrame APIs.
